title: elaeocarpus ovigerus
intro: Elaeocarpus ovigerus, also known as the sea rose or mountain rose, is a plant species native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus ovigerus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
